mnemonics: Neo's Graph: Cypher queries navigate the Matrix of connected data like Neo sees the code.
keyPoints: Graph databases store data as nodes, relationships, and properties.
Neo4j uses the Cypher query language for graph operations.
Graph databases excel at handling highly connected data and complex relationships.
commonMistakes: Trying to force graph data into a rigid relational schema.
Overusing complex traversals when a simple lookup would suffice.
Ignoring indexing strategies, leading to slow query performance on large graphs.
